steps.title: Identify the angle relationship
steps.content: When a transversal cuts two parallel lines, same-side interior angles are supplementary, so they sum to $180^\circ$. From the figure, $x$ and $36^\circ$ are same-side interior angles.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content:
• 44 gives $44+36=80$, not $180$.
  • 54 gives $54+36=90$, not $180$.
  • 144 gives $144+36=180$, so it works.
  • 324 is impossible for this interior angle.
That matches C.
